initial_entry.name: ZoyClip - Note to Short Video
initial_entry.author: zoy
initial_entry.description: Turn a note into a 9:16 vertical short video. A cloud LLM (OpenAI/DeepSeek) rewrites it into a script; local Kokoro TTS and ffmpeg render it with auto images, captions and music. Your note text is sent to the cloud LLM. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

current_entry.author: zoy
current_entry.description: Turn a note into a 9:16 vertical short video. A cloud LLM (OpenAI/DeepSeek) rewrites it into a script; local Kokoro TTS and ffmpeg render it with auto images, captions and music. Your note text is sent to the cloud LLM. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.
